planets.name: Uranus
planets.simpleMeaning: Modern refinement for sudden change, innovation, disruption, and unusual independence.
planets.calculationNote: Calculated with Swiss Ephemeris as a modern outer-planet refinement. Use as supporting context, not as the main Vedic judgement.

planets.name: Neptune
planets.simpleMeaning: Modern refinement for imagination, confusion, spirituality, and subtle sensitivity.
planets.calculationNote: Calculated with Swiss Ephemeris as a modern outer-planet refinement. Use as supporting context, not as the main Vedic judgement.

planets.name: Pluto

planets.name: Dhuma
planets.simpleMeaning: Solar sensitive point used as a subtle refinement for heat, pressure, and karmic smoke.
planets.calculationNote: Dhuma is derived from the sidereal Sun longitude. Calculated as a sensitive Jyotish refinement. Classical planets, Lagna, dasha, and chart context remain primary.

chalit.description: Parashari Chalit keeps the planet's rashi sign from D1, but refines house delivery using the Lagna degree as the midpoint of the first bhava.
limitations: Chalit refines house delivery; it does not change the planet's sign.
D1 Rashi remains the root chart. Chalit is used to refine which bhava receives the result.
Very small birth-time changes can shift planets near bhava boundaries.

bhavChalit.description: KP Bhava/cusp data uses Placidus-style cusps for star-lord, sub-lord, significator, and event-timing judgement.
limitations: This KP cusp layer is separate from Parashari Chalit.
Use it for KP cusp, star-lord, sub-lord, significator, and ruling-planet judgement.

kp.title: KP Horoscope Foundation
kp.description: KP is treated as a separate stellar astrology school using Placidus cusps, Krishnamurti ayanamsa, star lords, sub lords, significators, and ruling-planet logic.

significators.simpleMeaning: Sun connects KP event judgment to houses 1, 6, 12 through occupation, sign lordship, star lord, and sub lord links.
Moon connects KP event judgment to houses 2, 5, 6, 11, 12 through occupation, sign lordship, star lord, and sub lord links.
Mars connects KP event judgment to houses 2, 4, 9, 11, 12 through occupation, sign lordship, star lord, and sub lord links.
Mercury connects KP event judgment to houses 2, 3, 6, 10, 11, 12 through occupation, sign lordship, star lord, and sub lord links.
Jupiter connects KP event judgment to houses 1, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8, 10, 11 through occupation, sign lordship, star lord, and sub lord links.
Venus connects KP event judgment to houses 2, 3, 4, 9, 10, 11, 12 through occupation, sign lordship, star lord, and sub lord links.
Saturn connects KP event judgment to houses 1, 5, 6, 7, 8, 12 through occupation, sign lordship, star lord, and sub lord links.
Rahu connects KP event judgment to houses 1, 2, 5, 8, 11, 12 through occupation, sign lordship, star lord, and sub lord links.
Ketu connects KP event judgment to houses 1, 2, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9 through occupation, sign lordship, star lord, and sub lord links.

kp.horaryNote: KP Horary/Prashna uses question-time cusps, ruling planets, and often a 1-249 number. This natal KP horoscope stays separate from Parashari so event timing is not blended casually.
limitations: Use this KP layer for cusp, star-lord, sub-lord, significator, and ruling-planet evidence.
Event prediction needs cusp-specific sub-lord judgment, dasha support, ruling planets, and the exact question.
KP should remain separate from Parashari/D1 interpretation instead of being blended casually.
This yearly reading uses solar return, Muntha, dasha, and current Gochar.
Advanced Tajika yogas, Sahams, and Muntha strength scoring belong in the detailed yearly reading.

yogas.name: Budha-Aditya Yoga
yogas.meaning: Sun and Mercury share a house, supporting intelligent expression when ego and analysis stay balanced.

reasons: Birth time is not marked approximate and ascendant is not near a sign boundary.
questions: Was the recorded birth time taken from a document, hospital memory, or family recollection?

remedies.title: Work consciously with Rahu
remedies.practice: Keep one weekly discipline dedicated to Rahu: a simple prayer, mantra, study, or service act done without bargaining for results.
remedies.rationale: Rahu Mahadasha is the active life chapter, so remedies should stabilize that planet's expression rather than chase quick fixes.
remedies.cadence: Weekly, same day and time if possible
remedies.caution: Do not use remedies as a substitute for practical decisions or professional help.

remedies.title: Protect weaker ashtakavarga houses
remedies.practice: Audit choices connected to houses 2, 7 every Sunday evening and remove one avoidable source of strain.
remedies.rationale: Weak ashtakavarga houses need disciplined correction, not fear-based rituals.
remedies.caution: Keep the practice small enough that it becomes consistent.
